meta.title: Websites
meta.description: Manage your job board sources: LinkedIn, Indeed, Bayt and more. Add searches and get new roles in one feed.

header.title: Websites
header.subtitle: Manage your automated job board scrapers and tracking intervals.

list.noDataDescription: Add a website in the Websites section to start scraping job listings.
list.endReached: You've reached the end of the list.

card.deleteDescription: This will permanently remove {name} and its tracked URLs and jobs.
card.openSiteAria: Open {name} website in a new tab

form.activeStatusDescription: Enable or disable background scraping for this platform
form.selectorsHelper: Use AI to detect selectors from a URL, or add them manually.
form.validationUrlsRequired: Add at least one target URL.
form.validationUrlsNoDuplicates: Duplicate URLs are not allowed. Each URL must be unique.
form.validationIntervalMin: Interval must be at least 1 minute

urlsDialog.description: These pages will be scraped on the configured interval.
urlsDialog.validationAddOneUrl: Add at least one target URL.

urlsEditor.maxUrlsError: You can only add up to 10 URLs
urlsEditor.duplicateUrlError: Duplicate URLs are not allowed. Each URL must be unique.

autofill.title: Extract Selectors from HTML
autofill.info: AI will analyze it and try to find the correct CSS selectors. Paste the snippet below to begin the analysis.
autofill.htmlPlaceholder: Paste the HTML code of a single job card here...

generateUrls.title: Set up your job search
generateUrls.description: Tell us what you're looking for and we'll generate search URLs across job boards for you.
generateUrls.placeholder: e.g. I'm seeking a frontend React.js position at Cairo, Egypt, onsite
generateUrls.generatingDescription: We're building search links for LinkedIn, Wuzzuf, Indeed and other boards. This may take a moment.
